next_steps: Obtain blood cultures and start empiric intravenous antibiotics (e.g., ceftriaxone)
Perform CBC with differential, inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR), and coagulation studies
Perform echocardiography to evaluate for coronary artery involvement
Dermatology consultation for skin biopsy with H&E and direct immunofluorescence
Ophthalmology consultation for detailed slit-lamp examination
Serum testing for Rickettsia rickettsii antibodies and PCR
